generated_oml:
instance LidarSensor : DTDFVocab:SensingComponent [
    base:desc "LiDAR sensor providing raw point cloud data for object detection"
    DTDFVocab:producedData LiDARRawDataTransmitted
]

instance VehicleStateSensor : DTDFVocab:SensingComponent [
    base:desc "Sensor providing vehicle state parameters such as speed, position, and acceleration"
    DTDFVocab:producedData VehicleStateParametersTransmitted
]

instance LiDARRawDataTransmitted : DTDFVocab:DataTransmitted [
    DTDFVocab:producedFrom LidarSensor
]

instance VehicleStateParametersTransmitted : DTDFVocab:DataTransmitted [
    DTDFVocab:producedFrom VehicleStateSensor
]

instance LiDARRawData : DTDFVocab:Data [
    base:desc "Raw LiDAR point cloud data transmitted from physical vehicle"
    DTDFVocab:fromData LiDARRawDataTransmitted
    DTDFVocab:inputTo PointCloudClusteringAndTrackingEnabler
]

instance VehicleStateData : DTDFVocab:Data [
    base:desc "Vehicle state parameters including speed, position, and acceleration"
    DTDFVocab:fromData VehicleStateParametersTransmitted
    DTDFVocab:inputTo DataTranslationEnabler, ACCSystemEnabler
]

instance PointCloudClusteringAndTrackingEnabler : DTDFVocab:Enabler [
    base:desc "Processes raw LiDAR point clouds to identify and track objects"
    DTDFVocab:enables DataMonitoringService, ComputationOffloadingService
]

instance DataTranslationEnabler : DTDFVocab:Enabler [
    base:desc "Serializes data, aligns message types, and performs unit conversions"
    DTDFVocab:enables DataMonitoringService, RemoteManagementService
]

instance ACCSystemEnabler : DTDFVocab:Enabler [
    base:desc "Handles ACC system computations including lead vehicle detection, speed calculation, and actuation commands"
    DTDFVocab:enables ComputationOffloadingService
]

instance DataMonitoringService : DTDFVocab:Service [
    base:desc "Provides real-time viewing, saving, and generating reports of vehicle state data, projected driving paths, and detected object tracks via user interface"
    DTDFVocab:provides RealTimeVehicleStateVisualization, ObjectTrackVisualization, DataReporting
]

instance ComputationOffloadingService : DTDFVocab:Service [
    base:desc "Offloads ACC system computations from vehicle's ECU to Digital Twin"
    DTDFVocab:provides LeadVehicleDetectionAction, SpeedComputationAction, ActuationCommandAction
]

instance RemoteManagementService : DTDFVocab:Service [
    base:desc "Enables operators to enable/disable ACC, set desired speed, and send emergency braking commands; developers to troubleshoot using data collection and monitoring"
    DTDFVocab:provides EnableACCAction, DisableACCAction, SetDesiredSpeedAction, EmergencyBrakingAction, TroubleshootingInsight
]

instance RealTimeVehicleStateVisualization : DTDFVocab:Insight [
    base:desc "Real-time visualization of vehicle state data for monitoring"
]

instance ObjectTrackVisualization : DTDFVocab:Insight [
    base:desc "Visualization of detected object tracks for situational awareness"
]

instance DataReporting : DTDFVocab:Insight [
    base:desc "Generation of reports from vehicle state and object track data"
]

instance TroubleshootingInsight : DTDFVocab:Insight [
    base:desc "Data collection and monitoring capabilities for developer troubleshooting"
]

instance LeadVehicleDetectionAction : DTDFVocab:Action [
    base:desc "Detection of lead vehicles for ACC system"
    DTDFVocab:IsAutomatic true
]

instance SpeedComputationAction : DTDFVocab:Action [
    base:desc "Computation of desired speed based on distance to lead vehicle"
    DTDFVocab:IsAutomatic true
]

instance ActuationCommandAction : DTDFVocab:Action [
    base:desc "Generation of actuation commands for vehicle control"
    DTDFVocab:IsAutomatic true
]

instance EnableACCAction : DTDFVocab:Action [
    base:desc "Operator command to enable ACC system"
    DTDFVocab:IsAutomatic false
]

instance DisableACCAction : DTDFVocab:Action [
    base:desc "Operator command to disable ACC system"
    DTDFVocab:IsAutomatic false
]

instance SetDesiredSpeedAction : DTDFVocab:Action [
    base:desc "Operator command to set desired speed for ACC"
    DTDFVocab:IsAutomatic false
]

instance EmergencyBrakingAction : DTDFVocab:Action [
    base:desc "Operator command to send emergency braking"
    DTDFVocab:IsAutomatic false
]

instance UserEntity : DTDFVocab:Component [
    base:desc "User Entity containing Control Panel and 3D Visualization components"
]

instance ControlPanelComponent : DTDFVocab:Component [
    base:desc "Control Panel component for operator inputs"
]

instance VisualizationComponent : DTDFVocab:Component [
    base:desc "3D Visualization component for real-time data display"
]

instance DigitalTwinEntity : DTDFVocab:Component [
    base:desc "Digital Twin Entity handling data management and control mechanisms"
]

instance PhysicalTwinEntity : DTDFVocab:Component [
    base:desc "Physical Twin Entity managing data pre-processing, actuation, device communication, and automotive functionality"
]

instance DigitalTwinSystemEnvironment : DTDFVocab:Environment [
    base:contains UserEntity, DigitalTwinEntity, PhysicalTwinEntity, ControlPanelComponent, VisualizationComponent
]

instance virtual_to_physical_interaction : DTDFVocab:VirtualToPhysical [
    base:desc "Control commands generated by ACC Controlling FE and Control Panel User Interface FE are serialized through Data Translation component and transmitted over UDP over Wi-Fi to Actuation FE for physical actuation. Commands include motor actuation, steering servo adjustments, and vehicle state control signals. Message formats are standardized via Data Translation's serialization and unit conversion processes. Validation, authentication, conflict resolution, and execution confirmation mechanisms are not specified in the document."
]

instance twinning_time_scale : DTDFVocab:TimeScale [
    base:desc "Clock synchronization accuracy requirement of 100 ms for computation offloading between devices in safety-critical vehicular applications, mandated by hardware limitations despite industry standards typically requiring stricter synchronization (e.g., <100 ms)."
]

instance dt_constellation : DTDFVocab:Constellation [
    base:desc "The architecture follows ISO 23247 RA, with software components mapped to Functional Entities (FEs) and implemented as individual ROS2 packages, each containing one or more ROS2 nodes. The system is structured into three entities—User, Digital Twin, and Physical Twin—deployed across different hardware, with the Physical Twin Entity extending beyond the standard's OME to host general automotive functions. Component integration is achieved through ROS2's messaging system, enabling coordination between entities for real-time data processing and control."
]

instance dt_technical_connection : DTDFVocab:TechnicalConnection [
    base:desc "The system utilizes ROS2 for intra-component software communication and UDP over Wi-Fi for inter-entity communication. Network topology follows the architecture depicted in Fig. 2, though bandwidth, latency requirements, reliability, redundancy mechanisms, and security protocols are not detailed in the document."
]

instance standardization : DTDFVocab:Standardization [
    base:desc "Compliance with ISO 23247:2021 standard, which includes four parts: Overview and general principles, Reference architecture (Part 2), Digital representation of physical manufacturing elements, and Information exchange. The reference architecture defines entities such as Observable Manufacturing Element (OME), Data Collection and Device Control Entity, Digital Twin Entity, and User Entity. Interoperability is supported through protocols like OPC Unified Architecture (OPC UA) for data collection and device control."
]
